Our goal is to match the right ad to the right person at the right time. This is different than a traditional auction because the winner isn't the ad with the highest monetary bid but the ad that creates the most total value. So this is actually how Google started out with their paid search that you just bid high and win the placements. Google recognized that this approach wasn't working best because it doesn't mean that someone's bidding the highest is the best experience for the user.
